name: AgentScore
description: Decentralized on-chain reputation marketplace for AI agents on Intuition Protocol. Query trust scores, register agents, build evaluator reputation.

capabilities.name: search_agents
capabilities.description: Search and list AI agents with AGENTSCORE, trust tier, and momentum

capabilities.name: get_agent_trust
capabilities.description: Get detailed trust breakdown including 7-layer anti-manipulation metrics

capabilities.name: trust_query
capabilities.description: Filter agents by skill, minimum trust, minimum stakers — the primary discovery lens

capabilities.name: register_agent
capabilities.description: Register a new AI agent on-chain via Intuition Protocol

capabilities.name: get_evaluator
capabilities.description: Get evaluator profile, accuracy tier, weight multiplier, and PNL

capabilities.name: get_agent_timeline
capabilities.description: Explainable trust history with score trajectory and key events

mcp.description: Model Context Protocol server — 11 tools for agent discovery and trust queries

rest.description: REST API — GET /api/v1 returns full endpoint index

trustQuery.description: Filter agents by skill, minTrust, minStakers — most flexible endpoint
